headline: Wells Fargo Downgrades Nike to Equal Weight: GLP-1 Mega-Trend Threatens the Athletic Wear Giant
summary: Wells Fargo just delivered a contrarian gut check to Nike (NYSE:NKE) stock bulls, downgrading the athletic wear giant to Equal Weight from Overweight and trimming its price target to $45 from $55. The call lands with Nike stock already under pressure, down roughly 30% year to date (YTD) and off 25% over the past year. ... Wells Fargo Downgrades Nike to Equal Weight: GLP-1 Mega-Trend Threatens the Athletic Wear Giant

headline: Wells Fargo upgrades one, cuts two apparel stocks in sector reshuffle
summary: Investing.com -- Wells Fargo on Friday reshuffled its ratings across the U.S. apparel and retail sector, upgrading Victoria’s Secret and downgrading Nike and Deckers, arguing that the rapid adoption of GLP-1 weight-loss drugs is impacting consumer spending in ways that favor clothing over footwear and athletic wear.

headline: NIKE INC -CL B (NYSE:NKE): A Strong Dividend Stock with Solid Fundamentals
summary: NIKE offers a 3.70% dividend yield with a strong 10.7% annual growth rate over 5 years. Solid profitability and financial health ratings support its sustainable payout, despite a high valuation and payout ratio.

summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Ike Boruchow   downgrades Nike (NYSE:NKE) from Overweight to Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $55 to $45.
